message:
feat(sentinel): add Phase 4 failover state machine and slave selection

Implement failover FSM and slave selection algorithm:

failover.rs:
- SlaveScore struct for ranking candidates
- select_slave() picks best replica (priority → offset → runid)
- is_slave_eligible() filters S_DOWN, disconnected, priority=0
- FailoverEvent enum for FSM transitions
- advance_failover_state() drives WaitStart → SelectSlave → SendSlaveofNoone → WaitPromotion → ReconfSlaves → UpdateConfig
- check_failover_timeout() and should_start_failover() guards
- generate_slaveof_command/generate_slaveof_no_one helpers
- track_slave_reconfiguration and is_reconfiguration_complete
- finalize_failover() promotes slave to master

All 51 unit tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
